message:
🐛 Preserve mission deep-link query params through OAuth login (#1633)

* ✨ Shareable direct links for Mission Explorer cards

Add copy-link buttons to installer cards, solution cards, recommendation
cards, and the mission detail view header. Each mission gets a stable
URL-safe slug (install-<cncfProject> for installers, slugified title for
solutions) that works with the existing /missions/:missionId deep-link
route. Also fixes deep-link matching to search both installers and
solutions (previously only searched installers), auto-switching tabs
when a solution match is found.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Preserve mission deep-link query params through OAuth login

Save pathname + search (not just pathname) in useLastRoute so that
?mission= query params survive the OAuth round-trip. Also skip the
restore-last-route redirect when ?mission= is present, letting
MissionSidebar handle the deep-link.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
